title: Pacman-3D
Desc: A 3D twist on the classic Pacman game, this project features enhanced graphics and interactive elements, offering players an immersive experience with challenging mazes and power-ups.

title: CCDP
Desc: A robust construction project management tool designed to streamline documentation, progress tracking, and collaborative workflows, facilitating efficient project oversight from inception to completion.

title: Adopt Not Shop
Desc: An application promoting animal adoption by providing resources and profiles of pets, helping users find adoptable pets and raise awareness about shelter animals.

title: Valentine's Game
Desc: A lighthearted, interactive game celebrating Valentine's Day, designed to engage users with festive mini-games and challenges centered around themes of love and friendship.

title: Chat-Bot
Desc: An AI-driven chatbot that facilitates seamless user interactions, providing assistance and answers to frequently asked questions across various domains, with a focus on natural language processing.

title: Portfolio
Desc: A personal portfolio showcasing development skills, projects, and accomplishments in a visually appealing format, serving as an online resume and professional introduction.

title: Mini Projects
Desc: A collection of innovative small-scale projects designed to explore new technologies, experiment with creative ideas, and develop unique, functional solutions to common challenges.

title: Video Game Rental
Desc: A platform for renting video games that allows users to browse, select, and rent games easily, while managing inventory and tracking rental history effectively.

title: Prop-Chain
Desc: A blockchain-inspired project aimed at enhancing property management by securely recording transactions, managing ownership records, and ensuring transparent real estate processes.

title: Jerryssa
Desc: A website to celebrate my friends getting engaged.

title: RSVP
Desc: RSVP website for inviting guests to his retirement party.

title: Secret Santa
Desc: A fun and interactive website for organizing secret santa exchanges.

title: Voting System
Desc: An online voting system for company competitions: Salsa Competition and Jolly Costume Contest.

title: Umbraco Base
Desc: A base template for building websites with Umbraco, providing a solid foundation for custom development and rapid prototyping.

title: Food Services
Desc: GGUSD Food Services Department Website to manage and promote food service offerings.
